name: FamComply
tagline: Never lose a day of care because of a lapsed CPR card.
description: Enter your state and license type to get a pre-built renewal timeline that bundles CPR, first aid, background check, and inspection prep in the correct sequence, with reminders so nothing catches you by surprise.
ethics_concerns: Background check handling may involve sensitive PII if the tool stores results
Over-reliance risk if a reminder fails silently
